assertions.assertion: Output registers AddStackExchangeRedisCache with a Redis connection string for the distributed L2 cache tier
assertions.rationale: AddStackExchangeRedisCache is standard ASP.NET Core caching knowledge

assertions.assertion: Output sets CacheLifetimeBuffer to 120 in the AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement options
assertions.rationale: CacheLifetimeBuffer is a Duende-specific option not widely known

assertions.assertion: Output implements IHybridCacheSerializer<ClientCredentialsToken> using IDataProtector for encryption
assertions.rationale: IHybridCacheSerializer<ClientCredentialsToken> is a very specific v4 extensibility point

assertions.assertion: Output registers the custom serializer via AddHybridCache().AddSerializer<ClientCredentialsToken, ...>()
assertions.rationale: The HybridCache serializer registration pattern is highly Duende-specific

assertions.assertion: Output calls AddDataProtection() to enable the data protection provider
assertions.rationale: While AddDataProtection is known, connecting it to token cache encryption via custom serializer is not
